title: A New Beginning After the Flood
article_text: A terrible flood had disturbed the small town, and many people were left in poverty. The governor, who was newly elected, wanted to sponsor a project to help the town recover. He cited statistics showing that the quantity of damage was huge. A blind man, who had lost his home, felt pure despair. An ally from a nearby city promised to sustain the effort for months. The town had to bend its rules to allow faster rebuilding. A mature leader would have handled the crisis better if he had been more experienced. The bloody scenes from the disaster still alarmed the residents. Similarly, the gender of the volunteers did not matter; everyone worked together. A crazy idea to hold a music festival briefly lifted everyone's spirits, and the event was a success.

sentences.en: A terrible flood had disturbed the small town, and many people were left in poverty.
sentences.zh: 一场可怕的洪水扰乱了小镇，许多人陷入了贫困。

words.eng_def: a large amount of water covering land that is usually dry
to cause someone to stop what they are doing or to cause trouble
the state of being very poor

sentences.en: The governor, who was newly elected, wanted to sponsor a project to help the town recover.
sentences.zh: 新当选的州长想要赞助一个项目来帮助小镇恢复。

words.eng_def: to give money to support an event or activity

sentences.en: He cited statistics showing that the quantity of damage was huge.
sentences.zh: 他引用了统计数据，显示损失的数量巨大。

words.eng_def: to mention something as an example or as proof
an amount or number of something

sentences.en: A blind man, who had lost his home, felt pure despair.
sentences.zh: 一位失明的男子失去了家，感到纯粹的绝望。

words.eng_def: not mixed with anything else; complete

sentences.en: An ally from a nearby city promised to sustain the effort for months.
sentences.zh: 一位来自附近城市的盟友承诺将努力维持数月。

words.eng_def: a person who helps and supports you
to make something continue for a long time

sentences.en: The town had to bend its rules to allow faster rebuilding.
sentences.zh: 小镇不得不改变规则以允许更快地重建。

words.eng_def: to change the shape of something by making it curved; to change rules slightly

sentences.en: A mature leader would have handled the crisis better if he had been more experienced.
sentences.zh: 如果一位成熟的领导者更有经验，他本可以更好地处理这场危机。

words.eng_def: fully grown or developed; behaving like an adult

sentences.en: The bloody scenes from the disaster still alarmed the residents.
sentences.zh: 灾难中血淋淋的场景仍然让居民们感到惊恐。

words.eng_def: covered in blood; involving violence and blood
to make someone feel worried or frightened

sentences.en: Similarly, the gender of the volunteers did not matter; everyone worked together.
sentences.zh: 同样地，志愿者的性别并不重要；每个人都一起工作。

words.eng_def: the state of being male or female

sentences.en: A crazy idea to hold a music festival briefly lifted everyone's spirits, and the event was a success.
sentences.zh: 一个疯狂的想法——举办一场音乐节——短暂地提振了大家的情绪，活动取得了成功。

vocabulary.eng_def: unable to see
vocabulary.example: The blind man used a stick to walk.

vocabulary.eng_def: not mixed with anything else; complete
vocabulary.example: The water in the lake is pure.

vocabulary.eng_def: covered in blood; involving violence and blood
vocabulary.example: The accident left a bloody mess.

vocabulary.eng_def: a person who helps and supports you
vocabulary.example: She found an ally in her teacher.

vocabulary.eng_def: an amount or number of something
vocabulary.example: We need a large quantity of food.

vocabulary.eng_def: to change the shape of something by making it curved; to change rules slightly
vocabulary.example: He had to bend the wire to fit it.

vocabulary.eng_def: fully grown or developed; behaving like an adult
vocabulary.example: She is very mature for her age.

vocabulary.eng_def: for a short time
vocabulary.example: He spoke briefly about his plan.

vocabulary.eng_def: to make someone feel worried or frightened
vocabulary.example: The loud noise alarmed the children.

vocabulary.eng_def: to cause someone to stop what they are doing or to cause trouble
vocabulary.example: Please do not disturb me while I work.

vocabulary.eng_def: to make something continue for a long time
vocabulary.example: We need food to sustain our energy.

vocabulary.eng_def: a large amount of water covering land that is usually dry
vocabulary.example: The flood destroyed many houses.

vocabulary.eng_def: the state of being very poor
vocabulary.example: Many people live in poverty.

vocabulary.eng_def: very strange or not sensible
vocabulary.example: That is a crazy idea.

vocabulary.eng_def: to mention something as an example or as proof
vocabulary.example: He cited a study to support his point.

vocabulary.eng_def: recently
vocabulary.example: She is a newly hired teacher.

vocabulary.eng_def: two lines that are the same distance apart and never meet; similar
vocabulary.example: The two roads run parallel to each other.

vocabulary.eng_def: the state of being male or female
vocabulary.example: Gender should not affect your job chances.

vocabulary.eng_def: to give money to support an event or activity
vocabulary.example: A company will sponsor the race.

vocabulary.eng_def: a shoe that covers the foot and part of the leg; to start a computer
vocabulary.example: He wore boots in the rain.

quiz.question_en: Which word means 'an amount or number of something'?
Which word means 'to give money to support an event or activity'?
Which word means 'to make something continue for a long time'?
Which word means 'to mention something as an example or as proof'?

image_prompts: A small town flooded with water, people looking sad and wet.
A serious man in a suit giving a speech to a crowd, with a banner saying 'Rebuild Our Town'.
A man pointing to a chart with big numbers showing damage costs.
A blind man sitting on a broken chair, looking hopeless, surrounded by rubble.
Two people shaking hands, one holding a bag of money labeled 'Help'.
Workers bending a metal sign to change its shape, with a building being built behind them.
An older woman giving orders to younger workers at a construction site.
A street with red stains on the ground, people looking scared and covering their mouths.
A group of men and women working together to carry wooden boards.
A music stage set up in a damaged town, people dancing and smiling, with colorful lights.
